title: Saylor to Musk: Thanks to you, 25% of 'Mag8' firms now hold bitcoin
summary: Michael Saylor thanked Elon Musk for inspiring a quarter of the 'Mag8' firms to add bitcoin to their balance sheets, following SpaceX's historic IPO debut which reportedly included significant bitcoin holdings.
body:
Michael Saylor, the co-founder of MicroStrategy, took to X (formerly Twitter) to thank Elon Musk for his influence in driving bitcoin adoption among major corporations. "Thanks to you, 25% of the Mag8 now holds bitcoin on the balance sheet," Saylor wrote, congratulating Musk on SpaceX's historic IPO debut.

The 'Mag8' refers to a group of eight influential companies that includes Tesla, MicroStrategy, and others that have publicly disclosed their bitcoin holdings. Saylor's comment comes on the heels of SpaceX's IPO debut, where the company reportedly revealed substantial bitcoin reserves as part of its financial strategy. This move has reportedly encouraged other firms to reconsider their own treasury management strategies.

For everyday investors, this trend highlights the growing acceptance of bitcoin as a legitimate asset class for corporate treasuries. As more major companies adopt bitcoin, it could signal increased stability and legitimacy for the cryptocurrency market, potentially influencing individual investment decisions.

Investors should watch for further announcements from other 'Mag8' companies regarding their bitcoin holdings. The next few quarters could see more firms following SpaceX's lead, potentially driving up demand and price for bitcoin.
